programme.title: LEGO Masters
programme.desc: Teams have to build a stunt vehicle that has to go up a ramp and soar through a ring of fire, clear nine LEGO school buses, and explode on the ground which will be captured in slow motion.

programme.title: Surfing Australia TV
programme.desc: Showcases Surfing Australia's programs from junior development through to the elite athletes in surfing.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamhouse Adventures
programme.desc: Barbie and Trey compete to see who can get the best spot on the beach.

programme.title: Barney's World
programme.desc: Mel makes a big mess in the park and learns it's important to care for shared spaces. / After a disagreement among the kids about what to do with a ripe tomato, Vivie learns the importance of sharing.

programme.title: Lego Dreamzzz
programme.desc: In order to consolidate his power within the dream world, Izzie suggests that Dreamsmasher holds an election to become the legendary dream keeper.

programme.title: Bubble's Hotel
programme.desc: Bubble and Nabi try to stay up all night to make their bat guest Pip happy./Bubble suggests she take a souvenir to remember the hotel by.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Quadstrike
programme.desc: World-class Blader and loveable goofball, Dante Koryu, has arrived at Phantom's Gate to challenge the Dark Prince.

programme.title: Beyblade X
programme.desc: If Robin wants to give Tsubasa advice as a friend, he needs to prove his strength as a Blader. But when he challenges Tsubasa and the stakes grow too high, Tsubasa's urge to win is shaken to its core.

programme.title: Lego Friends: The Next Chapter
programme.sub-title: Social Likes Vs. Kindness/Beach Resort Showdown
programme.desc: Locked inside the comic store, Nova and Liann let their imaginations run wild. On a ride through the forest, Autumn becomes annoyed with Zac and Aliya.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamhouse Adventures
programme.desc: Barbie tries to help Renee find a talent to impress her family in China, but can't bear to reveal the truth about how far from perfect Renee's talents really are.

programme.title: Theatre Dome
programme.sub-title: Ash Can't Help But Be Cool
programme.desc: Welcome to the TheatreDome where two teams are battling for eternal acting glory! Players pitch a fun new idea of crowdsurfing in the theatre. Will they soar or will they hit the dirt?

programme.title: Lego Dreamzzz
programme.desc: After discovering the identity of Dreamsmasher, the dream chasers must figure out a way to stop him before he changes the dream world permanently.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: A man whom Fran snubbed in high school has written a play and threatens to jump off a ledge unless Maxwell reads it.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: A director plans to sabotage his production of Romeo and Juliet by casting Fran in the lead role.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Appalled by the children's school reading assignments, Morticia throws herself into the task of writing proper stories for children, Addams-style of course.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia takes up sculpting out of boredom, but things go down when an art critic shows his disapproval of Morticia's first sculpture.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: As a joke, Uncle Arthur switches Sam and Darrin's voices but can't seem to switch them back. Unfortunately, Louise Tate is visiting due to a fight with Larry.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.sub-title: I Don't Want to Be a Toad, I Want to Be a Butterfly
programme.desc: When Tabitha's classmate insists she wants to be in the butterfly group, Tabitha turns her into a real butterfly.

programme.title: LEGO Masters
programme.sub-title: Dragon Race and Grandscapes - The Second Elimination
programme.desc: The seven teams are challenged to build tiny dragons that are small enough to fly on a drone. The winner gets an advantage for the second build.

programme.title: LEGO Masters
programme.desc: In this 'spooktacular' episode, the six remaining teams will have 10 hours to embrace their dark side and complete their spooky builds.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: A man whom Fran snubbed in high school has written a play and threatens to jump off a ledge unless Maxwell reads it.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: A director plans to sabotage his production of Romeo and Juliet by casting Fran in the lead role.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: While abstinence makes George smarter, it has the opposite effect on Elaine. Kramer opens a smoker's lounge in his apartment as Jerry prepares to speak at a junior high school.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George squares off against a shipwreck survivor over a new apartment. Jerry attempts to help Newman get a much sought after transfer to Hawaii.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies Gomez's love letter and sends it to his teacher, but she knows that Gomez wrote it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A couple hopes to meet Gomez's cousin, who is a member of the social set.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Samantha calls Doctor Bombay to treat her sick willow tree. She gets caught in the spell and begins weeping every time the wind blows.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Darrin is turned into a very nice person by one of Endora's spells.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran pushes Maxwell to date again, and he ends up dating a woman like Fran.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Yetta moves in with the family when her home is fumigated, but Fran thinks she might be a bad influence for the children.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: A bad cheque threatens to ruin Jerry's reputation; raising chickens leads Kramer into illegal cock-fighting; George dates a women's prison inmate.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As Jerry discovers he's been duped by a hapless tennis pro, George seeks revenge against a co-worker's cutting remarks. Kramer enlists Elaine's help in drafting a living will.

programme.title: He's Just Not That Into You
programme.desc: A group of interconnected, Baltimore-based twenty- and thirty-somethings navigate their various relationships from the shallow end of the dating pool through the deep, murky waters of married life.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: A bad cheque threatens to ruin Jerry's reputation; raising chickens leads Kramer into illegal cock-fighting; George dates a women's prison inmate.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As Jerry discovers he's been duped by a hapless tennis pro, George seeks revenge against a co-worker's cutting remarks. Kramer enlists Elaine's help in drafting a living will.

programme.title: Rugby Heaven
programme.desc: Your one-stop rugby shop. This fast-paced show touches on the biggest talking points in the game - the latest breaking news, analysis, exclusive interviews, feature stories and special guests.

programme.title: Love Island All Stars
programme.desc: It's a day for big chats, a barney over Georgia S, and a long walk to the terrace. Plus, some very daring balloon action. Steamy snog, anyone?

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Durban
programme.desc: Jojo is running the show. She tells Sorisha that Zama has been calling the ladies, and gossiping about Angel, while Nonku confronts Zama to find out why she would come after Ameigh at her birthday party.

programme.title: LEGO Masters
programme.desc: Teams must create a song title out of LEGO, and make their builds clear enough that a musical mystery guest can guess what song they have built without them saying a word.

programme.title: Innovation Nation
programme.desc: Focused on innovation and investment in new technology. Western Australia is a unique market place dominated by innovation in the aerospace, defence industry, mining, oil and gas and now new energy source sectors such as Hydrogen.

programme.title: Barney's World
programme.desc: During a magical go-kart race Mel discovers that there's more to racing than just winning. / When Vivie accidentally breaks Mel's toy and is too afraid to admit it, Barney helps Vive find the courage to tell the truth.

programme.title: Lego Dreamzzz
programme.desc: After discovering the identity of Dreamsmasher, the dream chasers must figure out a way to stop him before he changes the dream world permanently.

programme.title: Bubble's Hotel
programme.desc: Nabi risks losing his perfect record of guest satisfaction. / Nabi struggles to tell Bubble that he likes his hair just the way it is.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Quadstrike
programme.desc: To escape the chaos at Phantom's Gate, Pri and Hanna have a sleepover at the Suiro house. Hanna's excited to tell Pri all about her family, which brings up some old memories.

programme.title: Beyblade X
programme.desc: Blader X and Robin visit Packun for some training, but the streamer greets them fully prepared to film a collaboration video. Once the cameras are off, Packun shares a rumor that has the potential to upend the entire Blading world.

programme.title: Lego Friends: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Aliya and Zac babysit Amalia and lose her; after a wild chase, they find her, and fall asleep exhausted as Aliya's mum returns, none the wiser.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamhouse Adventures
programme.desc: Barbie embarks on adventures with friends and family - including next-door neighbour Ken - in this animated vlog of adventures filmed inside her family's new dreamhouse.

programme.title: Theatre Dome
programme.desc: Welcome to the TheatreDome where two teams battle for eternal acting glory! A simple garage sale leads to catastrophe when our players turn into birds! Who can wing it to victory?

programme.title: Lego Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The dream splitter has an unexpected effect as it throws our dream chasers in different dream frequencies.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran pushes Maxwell to date again, and he ends up dating a woman like Fran.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Yetta moves in with the family when her home is fumigated, but Fran thinks she might be a bad influence for the children.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies Gomez's love letter and sends it to his teacher, but she knows that Gomez wrote it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A couple hopes to meet Gomez's cousin, who is a member of the social set.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Samantha calls Doctor Bombay to treat her sick willow tree. She gets caught in the spell and begins weeping every time the wind blows.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Darrin is turned into a very nice person by one of Endora's spells.

programme.title: My Way
programme.desc: Tim Blackwell introduces inspirational Aussies, each with a unique story about how they live their best life. It's a lifestyle program that allows people to tell their own stories firsthand to say, 'I'm doing this My Way'.

programme.title: Rugby Heaven
programme.desc: Your one-stop rugby shop. This fast-paced show touches on the biggest talking points in the game - the latest breaking news, analysis, exclusive interviews, feature stories and special guests.

programme.title: Premier League Stories
programme.desc: Nicknamed 'The Entertainers', the 1995-96 Newcastle United team set the league alight with their confidence and flair, going agonisingly close to claiming their first Premier League title.

programme.title: LEGO Masters
programme.desc: Each team has 10 hours to create a build that functions from the power of a wind machine.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran pushes Maxwell to date again, and he ends up dating a woman like Fran.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Yetta moves in with the family when her home is fumigated, but Fran thinks she might be a bad influence for the children.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As a bad cheque threatens to ruin Jerry's reputation, raising chickens involves Kramer in illegal cockfighting; George dates a women's prison inmate.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As Jerry discovers he's been duped by a hapless tennis pro, George seeks revenge against a co-worker's cutting remarks; Kramer enlists Elaine's help in drafting a living will.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighbourhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia suspects him to be Gomez when she discovers loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favourite photograph of Gomez is swallowed up by Cleopatra, her pet plant.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Darrin's mother hires a maid for Samantha.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Serena turns Darrin's Italian client into a monkey.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran starts dating an older man.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran's anniversary as a nanny for the Sheffields is coming up, but Maxwell seems to have forgotten all about it.

programme.title: The Wedding Singer
programme.desc: A man with a miserable love life travels from wedding to wedding singing romantic songs to happy newlyweds while dreaming of hitting it big as a rock star.

programme.title: The House
programme.desc: After the town takes away their daughter's college scholarship, a couple start an illegal casino in their friend's house to make back the money.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry's parents sell the Cadillac to help Jerry out with some money.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry's girlfriend, Ellen seems perfect but everyone else seems to have a problem with her.

programme.title: Love Island All Stars
programme.desc: So after Hannah made quite the impression on Tyler, could they be getting on on another level? And let's just say there's double trouble with the arrival of TWO new Bombshells.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Durban
programme.desc: Zama tells Maria that Ameigh admitted to lying to the group. The other ladies grow increasingly disgruntled with Zama. Maria confronts Sorisha for taking Angel's side. The ladies celebrate Nonku being snatched at her glow-up party.

programme.title: Talking Honey
programme.sub-title: Style over Substance: Why Are We Still So Focused On How We Look?
programme.desc: Host Shelly Horton is joined on the 9Honey panel by Ben Fordham, Georgie Gardener and Richard Wilkins to discuss relationship dilemmas and social issues.

programme.title: LEGO Masters
programme.sub-title: Car of the Future and Old is New
programme.desc: Tonight, the teams build a car of the future, and then turn something old into something new - the first challenge will have one team win an advantage, while the second challenge will be an elimination for one team.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamhouse Adventures
programme.desc: Barbie embarks on adventures with friends and family - including next-door neighbour Ken - in this animated vlog of adventures filmed inside her family's new dreamhouse.
